room.caption: [G2-WaterP7] Map 3: Side B

instance.creationCode:
sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,3) if dunState="6" image_blend=c_gray

sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,1) if dunState="6" image_blend=c_gray

sprite_index=sG2_Crystal image_speed=0
var dunState; dunState=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,2) if dunState="6" image_blend=c_gray

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=800 newMapY=512 toRoom=rLink2_PalaceW_8
var dunStateA,dunStateB,dunStateC; dunStateA=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,1) dunStateB=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,2) dunStateC=string_char_at(global.gameGate2Prog,3) if dunStateA="6" or dunStateB="6" or dunStateC="6" instance_destroy()
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=-2 yDir=0 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=3
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=4 xDir=0 yDir=4 shiftChange=64 spriteChange=3
